content: STREAM NOW ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/MasqueradeParty PRESAVE GAMER ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/GAMER Song by @CG5 Music Production by @FamilyJules7X & @CG5 Animation by @Wonchop Cover Art by @ShirotaniArt Follow CG5's social media: Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_ Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/ Follow @cg5live105, @cg5covers107, & @cg5instrumentals Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5 LYRICS: Every night we gotta wait, Expect the worst in our wake, When we’re all stuck in the highest point of outer space. Everything’s not what it seems, Swimming with uncertainty, And innocent blood keeps on bleeding out. Call-a call-a call-a meeting, it’s a Paranormal emergency. They don’t want no greetings, Want our heads on a pike. Won’t let us be. Come on, karma could be good to us, If we neutralize the murder scene. Gotta find the source of it all, cuz Try to live as we might- Death walks amOOOOOOOONg us. Supernatural homicide, AmOOOOOOOOng us. Could be you, could be I Among this crew. We cannot fathom what we’re due, One by one we meet our doom, doom, doom, doom, doom! Is this masquerade party over soon? (Not even close...) But hey we’re not really dead yet, right? I know it’s a hollow victory. Cuz some of us are dead so I I guess we might as well be. But what I’m tryna say is Even though we’re all sus. We shouldn’t make no fuss. Even though they’re stuck with us. Until they blow us up into pus. I don’t know where I’m going with this. But- Death walks amOOOOOOOONg us. Supernatural homicide, AmOOOOOOOOng us. Could be you, could be I Among this crew. We cannot fathom what we’re due, One by one we meet our doom, doom, doom, doom, doom! Is this masquerade party over soon? Call-a call-a call-a meeting, Saw you with that body, don’t go lyin’ to me. They don’t want no greetings, Show yourself already, And let us be. Come on, karma could be good to us, Good to be alive, I can’t believe, I gotta find the source of it all, cuz Death walks amOOOOOOOONg us. Supernatural homicide, AmOOOOOOOOng us. Could be you, could be I Among this crew. We cannot fathom what we’re due, One by one we meet our doom, doom, doom, doom, doom! Is this masquerade party over? AmOOOOOOOONg us. Supernatural homicide, AmOOOOOOOOng us. (It's right behind me, isn't it?) Could be you, could be I Among this crew. We cannot fathom what we’re due, One by one we meet our doom, doom, doom, doom, doom! Is this masquerade party over soon?
chineseTitle: | 化 | 装 | 舞 | 会 | | - | | 我 | 们 | 之 | 间 | 的 | 歌 | 曲 |
chineseContent: 立即串流 ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/MasqueradeParty PRESAVE GAMER ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/GAMER 歌曲由 @CG5 制作 音乐由 @FamilyJules7X 制作 & @CG5 动画由 @Wonchop 制作 封面艺术由 @ShirotaniArt 关注 CG5 的社交媒体：Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_ Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/ 关注 @cg5live105、@cg5covers107 和 @cg5instrumentals Discord 服务器 ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5 歌词： 每晚我们都要等待，做好最坏的打算，当我们全部被困在外太空的最高点。一切都不是看上去的那样， 充满不确定性， 无辜的鲜血不断流淌。打电话——打电话——打电话——开会，这是一个超自然的紧急情况。他们不想要任何问候，想要我们的头在长矛上。不会让我们这样的。来吧，如果我们平息了谋杀现场，因果报应对我们来说可能是件好事。必须找到这一切的根源，因为尝试像我们可能的那样生活——死亡在我们身边行走。超自然杀人，AmOOOOOOOOng 我们。这群人中可能是你，也可能是我。我们无法理解我们应得的，我们一一遭遇厄运，厄运，厄运，厄运，厄运！这场化装舞会快结束了吗？ （甚至还没有接近......）但是嘿，我们还没有真正死掉，对吧？我知道这是一场空洞的胜利。因为我们中的一些人已经死了，所以我想我们也可能死了。但我想说的是即使我们都是su。我们不应该大惊小怪。尽管他们和我们在一起。直到他们把我们炸成脓。我不知道我要去哪里。但是——死亡就在我们身边行走。超自然杀人，AmOOOOOOOOng 我们。这群人中可能是你，也可能是我。我们无法理解我们应得的，我们一一遭遇厄运，厄运，厄运，厄运，厄运！这场化装舞会快结束了吗？打电话-打电话-打电话-开会，
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
